title: Toothless Silly
description: This is a poorly made mod that adds Toothless in Minecraft and he dances!!!
body:
This is a poorly made mod that adds Toothless in Minecraft and he doesn't do anything that important,

just follows you around and dances if you feed him the GOLDEN APPLE!!

 

-HOW TO FIND HIM?

         -You can find him in the forest!!!!

 

-HOW CAN I MAKE HIM MY PET????

         -Feed him raw Salmon!!

 

 

 

thats it.....

 

credits to Cas van de Pol on YouTube for making that silly animation :D
